message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first distributed agent seed + IPC audit (tick 280)

3 ambient storage sites in `frankenterm/main.rs` migrated:

**`distributed_agent_seed_segment_cursors` (2 sites, shared `seed_cx`):**

- L13583 `storage_handle.get_panes_with_cx(&seed_cx)` — enumerate local
  panes at agent startup for cursor seeding
- L13590 `storage_handle.get_segments_with_cx(&seed_cx, pane.pane_id, 1)` —
  fetch latest segment per pane to seed the sync cursor

**IPC RPC audit write (1 site):**

- L11756 `record_audit_action_redacted_with_cx(&ipc_audit_cx, audit)` —
  called from `record_ipc_rpc_audit` after every IPC RPC response to
  log the rpc action for audit + rate-limit enforcement

All sites resolve cx via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`.
These were the last ambient `storage_handle.*` calls in the distributed
agent + IPC dispatch paths in main.rs (excluding test-mod).

Combined with tick 277's distributed persistence sweep, the distributed
agent storage surface is now saturated: seed cursors, payload persist,
pane-meta persist, envelope enrich, + IPC RPC audit all cx-threaded.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 94 (187-280).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 173 sites (170 before + 3).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 45 (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
